label: Nightfox
update_command: git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/EdenEast/nightfox.nvim /tmp/nightfox && for v in carbonfox dawnfox dayfox duskfox nightfox nordfox terafox; do cp /tmp/nightfox/extra/$v/alacritty.toml data/themes/nightfox/$v.toml; done
notes: 7 variants: Nightfox, Dayfox, Dawnfox, Duskfox, Nordfox, Terafox, Carbonfox
